### [`v0.5.0`](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/releases/tag/v0.5.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/compare/v0.4.1...v0.5.0)

#### What's Changed

#### New Contributors

- [@​unlobito](https://redirect.github.com/unlobito) made their first contribution in [#​87](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/pull/87)
